🌃 Cyberpunk 2077 Guides

Night City is brutal, but the right build makes you unstoppable. Our guides break down the math behind every perk, the synergy between cyberware, and the optimal progression path for each playstyle.

💡 Build Tips

  • Commit to one playstyle. Hybrid builds are weaker than focused builds. Pick your damage type and go all-in.
  • Cyberware matters more than weapons. The right OS and internal cyberware can 10x your effectiveness.
  • Read perk descriptions. Many perks have hidden synergies that aren't obvious from the name.
  • Save before major decisions. Some choices lock you out of content. Keep multiple saves.
